la-pina-mezcal-cocktail-with-pineapple-a.name: La Pina (mezcal Cocktail With Pineapple And Cilantro)

ingredients.prep: plus more ice cubes for the cocktail shaker

instructions: Put the large ice cube in an old-fashioned glass. Muddle the serrano chile with the cilantro leaves in a cocktail shaker. Add the mezcal, pineapple juice, simple syrup, lime juice, and ice cubes. Shake vigorously and strain over the large ice cube in the glass. Garnish with the pineapple leaf.

lau-lau.name: Lau Lau
instructions: Season fish, pork and chicken with Hawaiian sea salt. Place 2 ti leaves in an X on a flat surface for each of the 4 servings.

Place 1/4 of each of the fish, pork and chicken onto the center of 3 or 4 taro leaves. Wrap securely with the taro leaves, then place each wrap on a set of ti leaves. Tie the ends of the ti leaves together with a piece of string.
Place the bundles in a large steamer, and steam for 3 to 4 hours.

lean-with-tomato-the-traditional-recipe-.name: Lean With Tomato, The Traditional Recipe Of Our Grandmothers
lean-with-tomato-the-traditional-recipe-.original_name: Magro con tomate, la receta tradicional de nuestras abuelas

ingredients.item: 1 kg de magro de cerdo cortada en trozos
3 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: We add an extra virgin olive oil to a saucer and we put the pitted flesh back and we leapt to seal the flesh.
Once the meat is sealed, we add the white wine and let them cook for a few minutes to evaporate the alcohol.
Below we add onion cut into fine strips and well minced garlic teeth. We cook till the onion's clear.
We add the shredded tomato and the two laurel leaves and put water back to cover.
We let them cook at low heat with the pot covered up till the meat's juicy and tender about 1 hour. Let's get back and forth and watch that it doesn't get dry if we have to add some water.

Once the meat's at its point, the salsa will have reduced enough, at this moment we can remove the pieces of meat and pass through the beaker the salsa or leave with the onion pieces, garlic... at your choice, we re-integrate the meat if we have been retreated to shredder the salsa.
We serve hot and with French fries.

learn-how-to-make-ecuadorian-seafood-sou.name: Learn How To Make Ecuadorian Seafood Soup
learn-how-to-make-ecuadorian-seafood-sou.original_name: Aprende cómo hacer sopa marinera de Ecuador

ingredients.item: ½ kg of cuts of white fish
½ kg pitted and devoured shrimp
½ cup of Roasted and Ground Peanuts
Sal, pimienta y comino al gusto

instructions: En una olla grande prepara el sofrito con la cebolla blanca, la cebolla colorada, el tomate, el cilantro, el perejil y el aceite de color.
Sazona con sal pimienta y comino al gusto. Mezcla.
Agrega tres litros de agua hirviendo; tapa y deja cocinar por 10 minutos a fuego lento.
Agrega los mariscos bien lavados (desvenados los camarones).
Tapa bien y deja cocinar a fuego medio por una hora aproximadamente.
After time adds peanuts, fish and shrimp, and lets cook for 15 minutes on low heat.
Disfruta con patacones o arroz blanco.

leftover-chocolate-egg-brownies-argiro.name: Leftover Chocolate Egg Brownies
leftover-chocolate-egg-brownies-argiro.original_name: Brownies με σοκολατένια αυγά που περίσσεψαν

ingredients.item: 120 grsocolata (of chocolate Easter eggs-broken into pieces-not milk)
Some butter and some cocoa for the baking
120 grsocolata (of chocolate Easter eggs-broken into pieces-not milk)
Some butter and some cocoa for the baking

instructions: All materials must be at room temperature.
In ben marie, melt the chocolate and butter into cream.
Allow them to cool for 10 minutes.
In a bowl, add the eggs, sugar, vanilla, liqueur, salt and beat with hand mixer to homogenize.
Add the cold melted chocolate with the butter and beat at low speed to homogenize the mixture.
Finally, add the flour and simply fold the dough with spatula.
Brush 24×24 square baking pan and sprinkle with cocoa.
Blow the excess cocoa.
Pour the mixture and bake in a well preheated evening at 170 °C in the residence for 45 ́.
Cover the sweet surface with mint chocolate squares and bake for 1 minute to melt.
With a spatula, brush the melted chocolates so the mint filling can go everywhere.
Sprinkle with the green crushed candies.
Cut into square pieces and serve.

lemon-chicken-drop-meatballs.name: Lemon Chicken Drop Meatballs
instructions: Combine and mix together all of the ingredients (except for 1 tbsp of olive oil)
Heat remaining 1 tbsp olive oil in pan on medium heat.
Scoop chicken mixture out with a teaspoon and carefully place in pan, making sure not to overcrowd.
Once chicken meatballs are in the pan, sear well on all sides. (This should take approximately 2-3 mins on each side.)
If needed, turn heat down and continue cooking until internal temperature reaches 74°C.
Serve warm.

lemon-drizzle-cake.name: Lemon Drizzle Cake

ingredients.item: Nonstick vegetable oil spray or room-temperature butter
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 325°. Generously coat an 8½x4½" loaf pan with nonstick vegetable oil spray or room-temperature butter (no need to line; doing so will prevent the syrup from absorbing evenly). Whisk 1½ cups (188 g) all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. baking powder, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a small bowl to combine. Finely grate 2–3 large lemons to yield 2 Tbsp. zest; set aside. Cut lemons in half and squeeze out juice to yield ½ cup. Cook lemon juice, ½ cup (100 g) granulated sugar, and a pinch of salt in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring occasionally, until sugar is dissolved, about 1 minute. Let lemon syrup cool.

Beat ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, room temperature, 1 tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract, remaining 1 cup (200 g) granulated sugar, and reserved lemon zest in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment on medium speed until very light and creamy, about 5 minutes. Add 2 large eggs, one at a time, mixing to incorporate after each addition (don’t worry if batter looks curdled). Scrape down sides of bowl, add half of dry ingredients, and beat on low speed just to combine. Add ½ cup whole milk and remaining dry ingredients and beat until batter is smooth and creamy, about 1 minute. Using rubber spatula, scrape bottom and sides of bowl and fold batter a few times to ensure it’s evenly mixed. Scrape into prepared pan and smooth surface.

Generously coat the blade of a small paring knife with nonstick spray; run knife lengthwise through center of batter to create a shallow cut (this will help cake split cleanly along the line as it bakes rather than cracking randomly). Bake cake until golden brown, it springs back when gently pressed, and a tester inserted into the center comes out with only a few moist crumbs attached, 40–50 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cake cool 10 minutes.

Gradually and evenly pour lemon syrup over cake (it should be warm but not hot at this point). Syrup may pool on the sides but will absorb as the cake sits. Let cake cool completely. It should sit at least 2 hours, but preferably 8 hours before glazing. Cover tightly with plastic wrap if sitting longer than 2 hours.

Sift 1 cup (110 g) powdered sugar into a small bowl and stir in 1 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice and a pinch of kosher salt, adding up to 1 Tbsp. more lemon juice as needed to make a thick but pourable glaze.
Carefully run an offset spatula or butter knife around sides of cake; invert cake onto wire rack to turn out of pan. Turn cake right side up.

Pour glaze over cake, letting it drip down the sides. Let cake sit until glaze is set before serving, at least 45 minutes.
Do Ahead: Cake can be made 2 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

lemon-pie-of-argyros-argiro.name: Lemon Pie Of Argyros

ingredients.item: 3 medium juicy lemons, uncorned (we will use all the zest and 200 ml of their juice)
125 grout cut into pieces at room temperature
2 pieces of non-stick baking paper cut into the dimensions of the caps
3 medium juicy lemons, uncorned (we will use all the zest and 200 ml of their juice)
125 grout cut into pieces at room temperature
2 pieces of non-stick baking paper cut into the dimensions of the caps

instructions: Shake the flour with the baking powder.
Beat the butter with the wire in the mixer to fluffy.
Add the sugar and beat for 5 minutes to become cream.
One by one, add the eggs to absorb from the mixture.
Add the zest, salt and two tablespoons of the total flour.
Add the yogurt and mix well.
Finally add the rest of the flour.
We don't mix much since all the flour comes in.

lentils-with-tomato-and-basil-delicious-.name: Lentils With Tomato And Basil Delicious Recipe
lentils-with-tomato-and-basil-delicious-.original_name: Lentejas con tomate y albahaca receta deliciosa
instructions: Rinse lentils and necks into vegetable stock until they are tender.
In a frying pan, fry the onion, garlic, carrot and pepper till they are golden.
Agrega el tomate triturado y cocina a fuego lento durante 15 minutos.
It incorporates the cooked lentils and the bay leaf. Cooking at medium heat for another 20 minutes.
Add salt and pepper and minced basil. Rewind and cook for another 5 minutes.
Let rest 5 minutes before serving hot, this will allow the flavors to settle far better.

libbys-famous-pumpkin-pie.name: Libby's Famous Pumpkin Pie
instructions: Combine sugar, cinnamon, salt, ginger, and cloves in small bowl.
Beat eggs lightly in large bowl.
Stir in pumpkin and sugar-spice mixture.
Gradually stir in evaporated milk. Pour into pie shell.

Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Reduce temperature to 177°C (175 degrees C) and continue to bake until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean, 40 to 50 more minutes. Remove from the oven and set on a wire rack to cool to room temperature.
Serve cooled pie immediately or refrigerate until ready to serve. (Do not freeze as this will cause the crust to separate from the filling.)

lighter-basil-pesto.name: Lighter Basil Pesto

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Chop basil, garlic, and pine nuts in a food processor. Add ricotta cheese to basil mixture and process. Repeat with Parmesan cheese, olive oil, salt, and black pepper. Add vegetable broth and process until sauce is smooth. Add more broth if pesto is too thick.

loaded-grill-cheese-say-please-to-the-ch.name: Loaded Grill Cheese: Say Please To The Cheese!
instructions: Spread mayo on one side of each slice of bread.
Add the slice of cheddar cheese to one slice of bread.
Add even layer of mac ‘n’ cheese on top of cheese.
Add additional slices of cheddar on top of mac ‘n’ cheese.
Add jalapeños on top of cheese.
On low heat, add sandwich to a pan and grill mayo side down.
Grill for 3–5 minutes or until cheese melts and bread browns.
Enjoy!

loquat-crumble.name: Loquat Crumble
instructions: Remove seeds and blossoms from loquats, cut in half, and place into a saucepan. Drizzle with lemon juice immediately to prevent fruit from turning brown. Cover skillet and heat over low-medium heat until loquats release their juices and come to a simmer, 12 to 15 minutes. Stir often.

Whisk together sugar and cornstarch in a bowl and pour over simmering loquats. Stir well until thoroughly combined and return to a simmer over low heat. Cook until filling has thickened, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Heat a 9-inch cast-iron skillet in the oven for 5 minutes. Remove from oven and lightly coat with cooking spray. Transfer loquat filling to the skillet.

Lightly spoon flour into a dry measuring cup and level with a knife. Combine flour, brown sugar, vanilla extract, cinnamon, and salt in a bowl; cut in butter with a pastry blender until mixture resembles a coarse meal. Sprinkle mixture over loquat filling.
Place skillet on a sheet pan and bake in the preheated oven until filling is thick and bubbly and topping is browned, about 25 minutes. Remove from oven; let stand 20 minutes. Serve warm.

low-carb-keto-cheese-taco-shells.name: Low-carb Keto Cheese Taco Shells
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line two baking sheets with parchment paper or silicone mats.
Wrap the handle of a wooden spoon with aluminum foil. Balance between two tall cans.
Spread Cheddar cheese on the prepared baking sheets into four 6-inch circles placed 2 inches apart.

Bake in the preheated oven until cheese melts and is lightly brown, 6 to 8 minutes. Cool for 2 to 3 minutes. Lift with a spatula and drape over the wrapped wooden handle to make a taco shell shape. Cool until set, about 10 minutes.
